title: AATF Wave Frequency
wikitext:
[]: AATF = Wave Frequency?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 27, 2008 12:41 am Ok, every person, place, thing, anything, has a specific wave frequency. When one object is affected by something else (say, the wind) at the same frequency, it causes constructive interference. Combining the two waves into a single, bigger wave, at the same frequency. It one case about 60 years ago, it caused a bridge to collapse. ( This is real footage, not a movie. ) The wind frequency caused the bridges destruction. Which is why architects have to account for the wind or any other causes so this wouldn't happen again. (Soldiers don't march in unison when crossing a bridge because they might create a large enough wave that's equal to the bridge and cause it to collapse). I asked my physics teacher if even human bodies have a specific wave frequency. He said yes. (Though, I'm not sure he was really paying attention to me.) Evangelion also uses frequency a few times throughout the series. (i.e. the Prog Knife uses an extremely high frequency to increase its cutting sharpness.) So they must have has a good understanding of waves and frequency. So in Evangelion. Could the Anti-AT Field be a certain frequency that causes human bodies to lose shape and collapse into LCL?? (Also, Is this just a crack-pot theory made by a 14 yr old?)

[]:             Quote Post by The Teacher » Wed Feb 27, 2008 1:24 am You'll need a relatively high frequency to affect humans. However, because Evangelion is an anime, it may be used just for dramatic effect. Other than that, the AATF that things in the anime do, it would be of extreme wave frequency.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 27, 2008 1:28 am The Teacher wrote: You'll need a relatively high frequency to affect humans.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Feb 27, 2008 2:30 am I call pseudoscience. Human bodies are way too hetergenous in composition. Most vibrations would be damped out or absorbed by the structure of the human body. And sound waves can be absorbed by a lot more things as well. The Tacoma Narrows Collapse was an engineering failure caused by bad aerodynamics and a mix of other conditions that made the bridge deck sway and collapse.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Feb 27, 2008 8:54 am UrsusArctos wrote: I call pseudoscience.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Feb 27, 2008 9:47 am Protip: Don't get NGE mixed up with real life.

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Wed Feb 27, 2008 4:08 pm Yes, it could. By the way, you are talking about resonance frequencies [1] but with the bridge, like it's been said, that had more to do with wind resistance. Mythbuster already busted the soldiers marching on bridge thing. Now, the first thing to need to understand is that 'waves' does not only mean sound. Energy travels in waves--and some forms of energy travel in waves without even a medium, as in vacuum. In fact, colors are nothing but light at different wavelengths because different materials absorb different parts of the spectrum allowing you to see the parts that are not absorbed [2] . Waves can in fact affect and kill humans. Radiation comes to mind, and microwaves, and sunlight. I mean, there's a reason you don't put your cat in the microwave. I don't see why it wouldn't be theoretically possible for some yet undiscovered frequency--which, as I've said is nothing but a kind of energy--to break apart living cells at the molecular level to cancel the A.T. Field.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 27, 2008 4:39 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Human bodies are way too hetergenous in composition. Most vibrations would be damped out or absorbed by the structure of the human body. And sound waves can be absorbed by a lot more things as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Thu Feb 28, 2008 12:41 am Sachiel_13 wrote: Ok, sorry for not mentioning that I was referring to Mechanical Waves as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 28, 2008 12:56 am Um...You're getting me confused and making me doubt my own words. What. I'm just gonna shut up and pretend that never happened. Now discuss it if is possible for any kind of wave due to resonance. (If that made no sense, it's because I'm tired.)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Feb 28, 2008 11:49 am 1) Pseudoscience zomglol 2) You're propably thinking too much in this Besides, there's no way if your body would, uhh, be tanged due to resonance (lol) what would be left is liquid near identical to primordial sea water of earth

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Feb 28, 2008 4:48 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Ok, every person, place, thing, anything, has a specific wave frequency.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:35 pm EM Waves split to here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4640

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Mar 08, 2008 5:07 am Zugzwang wrote: It makes far more sense if you assume electromagnetic waves propagate through an aether.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Mar 09, 2008 3:16 am Nikola Tesla constructed a device that destroyed objects he attached it to using resonant frequency. He nearly destroyed his apartment building with this device and also used it to destroy a link from a large iron chain. Anyway that being said this isn't what an anti at field is, because if a humans body got broken down like that they would die, and the people who got tanged weren't really dead in the sense that we know of at least.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Mar 09, 2008 3:40 am Hey guys, why are all my catgirls dead? I very much miss them. Eh, its anime, you can make all the vibrations you want and turn the people into puddles by using waves.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 12, 2008 6:13 pm Defectron wrote: Anyway that being said this isn't what an anti at field is, because if a humans body got broken down like that they would die, and the people who got tanged weren't really dead in the sense that we know of at least.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Mar 13, 2008 2:45 am Let's not forget that humans in NGE are composed of LCL, which, apparently, is a magical liquid that can morph into all the different components needed to make up a human body (really, Lilith needs a good marketing team to promote the shit out of the stuff). *ahem* Anyway, we can very safely surmise that biology and science doesn't even remotely work the same way in the NGE universe as in ours (of course, they keep conveniences like space, time, gravity, etc.). In doing that, I think it's very easy to surmise that the ATF and AATF could easily have a very different effect on a body composed of LCL than normal "waves" do on bodies in our reality.

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 4:13 am You could theorize using this that Prog Knives and other assorted prog-weapons just vibrate at a frequency that makes cutting through Particle-Wave matter extremely easy.
